The Deep Sea Selvedge is a 12.5oz Japanese selvedge denim, enhanced with a one-wash treatment for improved texture and comfort, while retaining the best qualities of raw denim. This deep indigo x indigo denim has been fabric-rinsed, unlike typical garment washes that can leave jeans looking used. This method reduces fabric shrinkage before cutting and sewing, resulting in neater seams and less puckering in the final product. The Frankenstein Denim is a 14oz Japanese denim, intricately woven in an alternating twill pattern. True to its name, this denim is a mishmash of various construction details. The weave pattern alternates every 2 inches between left-hand twill and right-hand twill throughout the fabric. Since this denim does not adhere to a single twill direction, it cannot undergo anti-skewing, a traditional finishing process designed to eliminate the natural twist of the fabric. Consequently, the sections of left-hand and right-hand twill will twist along their bias over time, enhancing the fabric’s dynamic texture. Crafted with big slub yarns that alternate between thick and thin sections, this denim not only offers an incredible texture but also affects dye penetration during the rope dyeing process. This results in sections of the yarn fading at different rates, revealing a stunning spectrum of indigo hues as the denim ages. Made from 100% cotton, this denim offers a classic rigid raw denim feel. The jeans feature an upside-down leather patch—a distinctive hallmark found only in the Frankenstein Denim series. Proudly crafted in our Canadian factory, these jeans feature contrast stitching, a button fly, and silver metallic hardware.The Weird Guy is a standard tapered fit with a medium rise, a comfortable top block, and a taper from knee to hem.14oz Japanese Denim100% CottonButton FlyMade in CanadaSKU:101128103

The King of Slub 2 is a super heavyweight 23oz Japanese Selvedge Denim that takes texture to a whole new level. Made using a custom-developed "King of Slub" yarn, which took over two years to perfect, the yarns are extremely thick with a three-dimensional texture. The yarns are rope dyed, and due to the thickness and irregular shape of the yarn, indigo absorption varies wildly from section to section. This creates patches of high and low indigo absorption points in the denim. Over time with wear, as the indigo starts to fade, a wide gradient of indigo becomes visible, and the thickness of the yarn allows for an extreme high contrast three-dimensional textured fade. Additionally, the thickness of the denim emphasizes all your wear patterns, resulting in an incredible fading experience. For the second iteration of the King of Slub, a beige weft was added to give the denim a warm, earthy tone. Other details include antique copper hardware, a button fly, a Cuba tan leather patch, a hidden selvedge coin pocket, and a classic redline selvedge ID.The Super Guy is a skinny fit with a medium rise, a slim top block, and a taper from knee to hem.Please note chainstitch hemming service is NOT available for this item. If you request hemming, it will be done with single needle stitching.23oz Japanese Selvedge DenimUnsanforized - Will Shrink After WashRefer To The Measurement Charts For Sizing100% CottonMade in CanadaSKU:101905000

The Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan (MIJ) collection is celebrating its 10th iteration with the return of a fan favorite: the iconic Okayama Spirit Selvedge. This marks the first time the original has been rereleased since it was first released in 2013.The Okayama Spirit is a 16oz unsanforized slubby Japanese selvedge denim that is dyed using the indigo rope dyeing process. In this process, cotton yarns are repeatedly run through vats of indigo dye, but not long enough for the dye to fully penetrate the yarn core. This creates a unique pattern in the fabric as thicker sections of the yarn absorb more indigo and thinner sections absorb less. The yarns themselves also have an irregular, slubby texture which adds to the overall texture of the fabric. To further enhance the texture, the denim is slowly woven on vintage shuttle looms, which creates a wavy weave pattern when viewed up close. The combination of the irregular slubby yarns and the loose weaving of the fabric gives it an organic, uneven grain that is signature of the Okayama Spirit's iconic textured look.To preserve the hairiness, grittiness, and raw denim feel of this unsanforized denim, the MIJ10 undergoes a tempi treatment which shrinks the fabric while maintaining its texture. This removes the guesswork from sizing and allows you to get the correct size from the start. The MIJ10 also features a range of finishing touches that add to its character and appeal. These include 100% iron buttons that will rust, copper rivets that will oxidize, raised belt loops that will fade, a Japanese sheepskin leather patch with the "Flower of Carnage" logo, a selvedge button fly, and a micro busted outseam. The jeans also feature a maple leaf embroidered onto the back pocket, a signature of the MIJ series.The MIJ10 is made in Japan from start to finish, ensuring its high quality. The expert craftsmanship that goes into each pair is evident in the attention to detail and care taken at every stage of the production process, from the dyeing of the yarn, weaving of the fabric, to the cutting and sewing of the denim.The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.16oz Japanese Selvedge Denim100% CottonButton FlyRinse-washed, Tempi-treatedMade in JapanSKU:101505006

Introducing the Aomidori Selvedge, the 12th edition in the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan collection. Deriving its name from the Japanese "Aomidori," meaning blue-green, this denim offers a stunning visual twist. At first glance, it resembles traditional indigo denim, yet it uniquely fades to a captivating greenish hue, thanks to an innovative dye technique.There are two primary methods to achieve greencast denim: top dye and bottom dye. The top dye method involves adding a green tint after the indigo, giving the denim an initial green appearance. Conversely, the bottom dye technique, used for the Aomidori Selvedge, applies a green tint before the indigo rope dye process. This unique approach allows the denim to gradually reveal its greenish hue as it fades, setting it apart in both style and wear pattern.Crafted with a robust 16oz weight, the denim is woven on vintage shuttle looms in Okayama, Japan. It remains unsanforized to retain its purest form, free from mechanical shrinkage processes, anti-skewing, or singeing. This preservation enhances the fabric’s texture, characterized by its pronounced vertical streakiness and the irregular sizes of its bumpy yarns, which fade at slightly different rates, adding depth and character to each pair.To maintain its raw, textured appeal, the Aomidori Selvedge undergoes a tempi treatment. This process carefully shrinks the fabric while preserving its distinct characteristics, ensuring you can select your ideal fit from the start.The jeans also boast a variety of expert finishing touches that contribute to its unique character: 100% iron buttons that develop a rust and patina, copper rivets that naturally oxidize, raised belt loops that fade and add dimension with wear, a premium sheepskin leather patch featuring the "Flower of Carnage" logo, a selvedge fly, and a micro busted outseam. Additionally, a maple leaf embroidered on the back pocket adds a signature touch, encapsulating the heritage of the MIJ series.Every element of the Aomidori Selvedge is meticulously crafted in Japan, showcasing the exceptional skill and attention to detail that goes into every step of the production process—from the dyeing of the yarns and the weaving of the fabric to the cutting and sewing of the final garment.The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.16oz Japanese Selvedge Denim100% CottonButton FlyRinse-washed, Tempi-treatedMade in JapanSKU:101056606

Introducing the Aomidori Selvedge, the 12th edition in the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan collection. Deriving its name from the Japanese "Aomidori," meaning blue-green, this denim offers a stunning visual twist. At first glance, it resembles traditional indigo denim, yet it uniquely fades to a captivating greenish hue, thanks to an innovative dye technique.There are two primary methods to achieve greencast denim: top dye and bottom dye. The top dye method involves adding a green tint after the indigo, giving the denim an initial green appearance. Conversely, the bottom dye technique, used for the Aomidori Selvedge, applies a green tint before the indigo rope dye process. This unique approach allows the denim to gradually reveal its greenish hue as it fades, setting it apart in both style and wear pattern.Crafted with a robust 16oz weight, the denim is woven on vintage shuttle looms in Okayama, Japan. It remains unsanforized to retain its purest form, free from mechanical shrinkage processes, anti-skewing, or singeing. This preservation enhances the fabric’s texture, characterized by its pronounced vertical streakiness and the irregular sizes of its bumpy yarns, which fade at slightly different rates, adding depth and character to each pair.To maintain its raw, textured appeal, the Aomidori Selvedge undergoes a tempi treatment. The Frankenstein Denim is a 14oz Japanese denim, intricately woven in an alternating twill pattern. True to its name, this denim is a mishmash of various construction details. Introducing the Aomidori Selvedge, the 12th edition in the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan collection. Deriving its name from the Japanese "Aomidori," meaning blue-green, this denim offers a stunning visual twist. At first glance, it resembles traditional indigo denim, yet it uniquely fades to a captivating greenish hue, thanks to an innovative dye technique.There are two primary methods to achieve greencast denim: top dye and bottom dye. The top dye method involves adding a green tint after the indigo, giving the denim an initial green appearance. Conversely, the bottom dye technique, used for the Aomidori Selvedge, applies a green tint before the indigo rope dye process. This unique approach allows the denim to gradually reveal its greenish hue as it fades, setting it apart in both style and wear pattern.Crafted with a robust 16oz weight, the denim is woven on vintage shuttle looms in Okayama, Japan. It remains unsanforized to retain its purest form, free from mechanical shrinkage processes, anti-skewing, or singeing. This preservation enhances the fabric’s texture, characterized by its pronounced vertical streakiness and the irregular sizes of its bumpy yarns, which fade at slightly different rates, adding depth and character to each pair.To maintain its raw, textured appeal, the Aomidori Selvedge undergoes a tempi treatment. This process carefully shrinks the fabric while preserving its distinct characteristics, ensuring you can select your ideal fit from the start.The jeans also boast a variety of expert finishing touches that contribute to its unique character: 100% iron buttons that develop a rust and patina, copper rivets that naturally oxidize, raised belt loops that fade and add dimension with wear, a premium sheepskin leather patch featuring the "Flower of Carnage" logo, a selvedge fly, and a micro busted outseam. Additionally, a maple leaf embroidered on the back pocket adds a signature touch, encapsulating the heritage of the MIJ series.Every element of the Aomidori Selvedge is meticulously crafted in Japan, showcasing the exceptional skill and attention to detail that goes into every step of the production process—from the dyeing of the yarns and the weaving of the fabric to the cutting and sewing of the final garment.The Weird Guy is a standard tapered fit with a medium rise, a comfortable top block, and a taper from knee to hem.16oz Japanese Selvedge Denim100% CottonButton FlyRinse-washed, Tempi-treatedMade in JapanSKU:101056603

The Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan (MIJ) collection is celebrating its 10th iteration with the return of a fan favorite: the iconic Okayama Spirit Selvedge. This marks the first time the original has been rereleased since it was first released in 2013.The Okayama Spirit is a 16oz unsanforized slubby Japanese selvedge denim that is dyed using the indigo rope dyeing process. In this process, cotton yarns are repeatedly run through vats of indigo dye, but not long enough for the dye to fully penetrate the yarn core. This creates a unique pattern in the fabric as thicker sections of the yarn absorb more indigo and thinner sections absorb less. The yarns themselves also have an irregular, slubby texture which adds to the overall texture of the fabric. To further enhance the texture, the denim is slowly woven on vintage shuttle looms, which creates a wavy weave pattern when viewed up close. The combination of the irregular slubby yarns and the loose weaving of the fabric gives it an organic, uneven grain that is signature of the Okayama Spirit's iconic textured look.To preserve the hairiness, grittiness, and raw denim feel of this unsanforized denim, the MIJ10 undergoes a tempi treatment which shrinks the fabric while maintaining its texture. This removes the guesswork from sizing and allows you to get the correct size from the start. The MIJ10 also features a range of finishing touches that add to its character and appeal. Introducing the Aomidori Selvedge, the 12th edition in the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan collection. Deriving its name from the Japanese "Aomidori," meaning blue-green, this denim offers a stunning visual twist. At first glance, it resembles traditional indigo denim, yet it uniquely fades to a captivating greenish hue, thanks to an innovative dye technique.There are two primary methods to achieve greencast denim: top dye and bottom dye. The top dye method involves adding a green tint after the indigo, giving the denim an initial green appearance. Conversely, the bottom dye technique, used for the Aomidori Selvedge, applies a green tint before the indigo rope dye process. This unique approach allows the denim to gradually reveal its greenish hue as it fades, setting it apart in both style and wear pattern.Crafted with a robust 16oz weight, the denim is woven on vintage shuttle looms in Okayama, Japan. It remains unsanforized to retain its purest form, free from mechanical shrinkage processes, anti-skewing, or singeing. This preservation enhances the fabric’s texture, characterized by its pronounced vertical streakiness and the irregular sizes of its bumpy yarns, which fade at slightly different rates, adding depth and character to each pair.To maintain its raw, textured appeal, the Aomidori Selvedge undergoes a tempi treatment. This process carefully shrinks the fabric while preserving its distinct characteristics, ensuring you can select your ideal fit from the start.The jeans also boast a variety of expert finishing touches that contribute to its unique character: 100% iron buttons that develop a rust and patina, copper rivets that naturally oxidize, raised belt loops that fade and add dimension with wear, a premium sheepskin leather patch featuring the "Flower of Carnage" logo, and selvedge fly. The Deep Sea Selvedge is a 12.5oz Japanese selvedge denim, enhanced with a one-wash treatment for improved texture and comfort, while retaining the best qualities of raw denim. product_description: The MIJ 9 "Tennen Ai" Natural Indigo Selvedge is a 15oz Japanese selvedge denim made using 2 kinds of natural indigo dyed yarns. product_name: True Guy - MIJ12 - Aomidori Selvedge (No Embroidery)
product_description: *This is a model without the back pocket embroidery. For the model with the embroidery, please visitthis page.Introducing the Aomidori Selvedge, the 12th edition in the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan collection. Deriving its name from the Japanese "Aomidori," meaning blue-green, this denim offers a stunning visual twist. At first glance, it resembles traditional indigo denim, yet it uniquely fades to a captivating greenish hue, thanks to an innovative dye technique.There are two primary methods to achieve greencast denim: top dye and bottom dye. The top dye method involves adding a green tint after the indigo, giving the denim an initial green appearance. Conversely, the bottom dye technique, used for the Aomidori Selvedge, applies a green tint before the indigo rope dye process. This unique approach allows the denim to gradually reveal its greenish hue as it fades, setting it apart in both style and wear pattern.Crafted with a robust 16oz weight, the denim is woven on vintage shuttle looms in Okayama, Japan. It remains unsanforized to retain its purest form, free from mechanical shrinkage processes, anti-skewing, or singeing. This preservation enhances the fabric’s texture, characterized by its pronounced vertical streakiness and the irregular sizes of its bumpy yarns, which fade at slightly different rates, adding depth and character to each pair.To maintain its raw, textured appeal, the Aomidori Selvedge undergoes a tempi treatment. This process carefully shrinks the fabric while preserving its distinct characteristics, ensuring you can select your ideal fit from the start.The jeans also boast a variety of expert finishing touches that contribute to its unique character: 100% iron buttons that develop a rust and patina, copper rivets that naturally oxidize, raised belt loops that fade and add dimension with wear, a premium sheepskin leather patch featuring the "Flower of Carnage" logo, and selvedge fly.Every element of the Aomidori Selvedge is meticulously crafted in Japan, showcasing the exceptional skill and attention to detail that goes into every step of the production process—from the dyeing of the yarns and the weaving of the fabric to the cutting and sewing of the final garment.The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a regular rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.16oz Japanese Selvedge Denim100% CottonButton FlyRinse-washed, Tempi-treatedMade in JapanSKU:101056621Note: The True Guy features a standard selvedge out seam and not the micro out seam detail as seen in other MIJ models.

product_name: Super Guy - Sea Island Selvedge - Indigo
product_description: The Sea Island Selvedge is a 12oz Japanese selvedge denim crafted from Virgin American Sea Island Cotton—the most luxurious denim we’ve ever produced. Sea Island Cotton is an ultra-rare Extra-Long Staple cotton. Renowned for its silky luster, uniform texture, cashmere-like softness, and exceptional durability, this cotton has a rich and storied past. Originally cultivated in the West Indies in the 1600s, it was once so coveted that British royalty tried to keep it exclusive. In the 1800s, seeds made their way to the American colonies, but a devastating beetle infestation nearly wiped it out in the 1920s.Fast forward to 2015…. seeds that were tucked away in a seed vault are plated in Texas and New Mexico. product_name: Weird Guy - MIJ14 - Haru Kaze Selvedge
product_description: The MIJ14 – Haru Kaze Selvedge marks the first lightweight denim in the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan line. Weighing in at just 8.6oz, this denim is crafted in a 2x1 workwear style using lightweight slub yarn. The result is a fabric rich in neps on both the warp and weft sides.Made from 100% recycled cotton, the interior weft is dyed brown, giving the denim a warm, inviting tone. This denim is loomstate, meaning it hasn't gone through conventional finishing processes like anti-skewing, singeing, or sanforization. This preserves the denim's natural hairy and slubby texture, and over time, the legs will twist—a hallmark of traditional denim craftsmanship. To manage shrinkage, the denim undergoes a tempi treatment—a soak and hang-dry process that eliminates shrinkage while maintaining the crispy raw feel.Finishing touches include a sheepskin leather patch, 100% copper rivets with hidden back pocket rivets, and 100% iron buttons—hardware that will patina and age gracefully alongside the denim. Additionally, the signature Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan maple leaf embroidery is proudly featured on the back pocket.The Weird Guy is a standard tapered fit with a medium rise, a comfortable top block, and a taper from knee to hem.8.6oz Japanese Selvedge Denim100% CottonButton FlyRinse-washed, Tempi-treatedMade in JapanSKU: 101129003

product_name: Super Guy -  Brown Fox Selvedge - Brown
product_description: Introducing the Brown Fox Selvedge, a 13oz Japanese selvedge denim made entirely from organic FoxFibre® cotton—grown in California by cotton breeder and environmental pioneer Sally Fox. This denim contains no dyes or bleach. The brown color comes directly from the cotton plant itself.Sally Fox began her work in the 1980s, selectively breeding heirloom brown cotton varieties with white Pima to create long-staple, naturally pigmented cotton that could be commercially spun. The result is a warm, earthy-toned fabric with subtle surface variation and a soft hand. product_name: Super Guy - MIJ15 - Hand Dyed Natural Indigo x Kakishibu Intangible Cultural Treasure Selvedge Denim
product_description: This limited-edition release is part of our Made in Japan series, where we take the most traditional techniques, use the best materials we can get our hands on, and build everything with old-school construction. The MIJ15 is a 15oz selvedge denim, and the yarns are dyed using two ancient natural dyes, indigo and kakishibu.The warp is dyed in Tokushima, on Shikoku Island, using a process that’s been around for hundreds of years. It’s such an important part of Japanese culture that it’s officially recognized as an Intangible Cultural Treasure. The yarns are bundled into hanks, dipped into natural indigo dye vats that are literally buried in the ground, then pulled out and oxidized in the open air. But because the yarn is bundled, some parts are exposed more than others. So what you get is uneven oxidation across the yarn, some parts darker, some lighter, and that creates a really rich, varied range of indigo shades across the fabric. This only happens with natural dye, and only when it’s done by hand.The weft is dyed with kakishibu, which is made from fermented persimmon. This dye’s been used in Japan for over a thousand years, and it gives the yarn a kind of burnt orange or brown tone that comes through the surface of the denim. The mix of that color underneath the indigo, plus the texture from the slubby yarns, gives this fabric so much dimension. It almost looks like it’s glowing in certain lighting.The patch is real Shell Cordovan—dense horsehide that ages beautifully. And all the MIJ details are here: 100% iron buttons, copper rivets, raised belt loops, hidden back pocket rivets, selvedge fly, and the peekaboo selvedge on the coin pocket.The Super Guy is a slim tapered fit; medium rise, slim thigh and taper from the knee to hem.15ozJapanese Selvedge Denim100% CottonButton FlyRinse-washed, Tempi-treatedMade in JapanSKU:101133900

product_name: Super Guy - Dia De Los Muertos Selvedge - Indigo
product_description: The Dia De Los Muertos Selvedge is a 12.5oz Japanese selvedge denim inspired by Mexico’s vibrant Day of the Dead tradition. Woven in Okayama, Japan on vintage shuttle looms, it uses rope-dyed short slub yarns to create a textured surface that will develop dramatic, high-contrast vertical fades over time. The Kawataro Selvedge is a fresh greencast interpretation of our legendary Japan Heritage denim. It draws inspiration from Kawataro, the mischievous Japanese river God, also known as Kappa.
